post.summary: Create a new customer or retrieve a customer by its external id

400.description: Bad Request : check request values and format

403.description: Unauthenticated or authenticated with insufficient access

500.description: Server Error. This applies to all 5xx errors, including but not limited to 500, 501, 502, 503, and 504 errors. You should treat all of these errors the same.

get.description: Returns a list of customers that match the query parameters. The customers are sorted by external id.

parameters.name: customerIds
parameters.description: Meld generated unique identifier for your customer. This should be used to track customer activity. This takes a comma separated list of customer ids.

parameters.name: externalCustomerId
parameters.description: Your unique identifier for your customer. If maintaining your own customer management system this can also be used for tracking customer activity.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Key of customer to get before. The next batch of results will be immediately before this customer.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Key of customer to get after. The next batch of results will be immediately after this customer.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description:
Limits number of returned customers.

Default value: 10 or the number of customer ids provided

Minimum value: 1

Maximum value: 100

400.description: Bad Request : check request values and format

403.description: Unauthenticated or authenticated with insufficient access

500.description: Server Error. This applies to all 5xx errors, including but not limited to 500, 501, 502, 503, and 504 errors. You should treat all of these errors the same.

400.description: Bad Request : check request values and format

403.description: Unauthenticated or authenticated with insufficient access

500.description: Server Error. This applies to all 5xx errors, including but not limited to 500, 501, 502, 503, and 504 errors. You should treat all of these errors the same.

delete.description:
Use this endpoint to delete a customer with Meld and/or with any of the service providers it is linked to. This endpoint should only be used for customers using the Bank-Linking stack, as it is not yet compatible with the Payments or Crypto stack. If a customer is deleted that is linked to a Payments or Crypto service provider customer, it will still be deleted with Meld, but not with the provider.

Note: For customers using the Bank-Linking stack, this will delete all of the customer's connections and financial accounts as well.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Meld generated unique identifier for your customer. This should be used to track customer activity.

parameters.name: serviceProviders
parameters.description:
Comma separated list of service providers. If present, the customer will only be deleted with these specified service provider(s), but the Meld customer will remain active. This can be useful for when service providers impose restrictions on the number of customers allowed in their sandbox/development environments. In such cases, you may only want to delete the customer with that provider, but maintain it for other providers it is connected to, if any. If this parameter is absent, then the customer will be deleted with all the service providers it is linked to and the Meld customer will be deleted as well.

Note: Currently, this endpoint only supports deleting Bank-Linking service provider customers. Therefore, Payments/Crypto service providers should not be included.

400.description: Bad Request : check request values and format

403.description: Unauthenticated or authenticated with insufficient access

500.description: Server Error. This applies to all 5xx errors, including but not limited to 500, 501, 502, 503, and 504 errors. You should treat all of these errors the same.

400.description: Bad Request : check request values and format

403.description: Unauthenticated or authenticated with insufficient access

409.description: KYC already initiated for this customer and provider

422.description: Customer is not compliant for KYC sharing

500.description: Server Error. This applies to all 5xx errors, including but not limited to 500, 501, 502, 503, and 504 errors. You should treat all of these errors the same.

key.description: When this account is part of a paginated list, this key represents its position in the list.
When this user invitation is part of a paginated list, this key represents its position in the list.

updatedAt.description: Date and time status was updated

accountLogoUrl.description: The path to the account's logo for displaying in the bank picker

borderColor.description: The color of the border for the bank picker

borderTextColor.description: The color of the text on the bank picker border (i.e. 'Integrations powered by Meld.io')

font.description: The desired font to use for the Meld picker

institutionSelectionText.description: The text to display at the top of bank picker

routingRetry.description: Whether to present the option to try to connect to the institution again with a different service provider if the last attempt failed. If a value is not set, it is assumed to be false.

routingRetryBankButtonColor.description: The color of the routing retry button to select a different institution

routingRetryProviderButtonColor.description: The color of the routing retry button to select a different provider

selectionStyle.description: The style in which the bank picker displays the institutions

showBorder.description: Whether to show the border for the bank picker widget. If a value is not set, it is assumed to be false.

type.description:
Type of preference to create for this account.

Note: Only one preference of each type can exist. To edit an existing preference, use the Update an account preference endpoint instead

accountLogoUrl.description: The path to the account's logo for displaying in the wizard

borderColor.description: The color of the border for the wizard

borderTextColor.description: The color of the text on the wizard border (i.e. 'Integrations powered by Meld.io')

buttonColor.description: The button color for the widget in light mode

buttonTextColor.description: The color of the Buy/Sell text on the CTA button

enableMeldCryptoWizard.description: Whether to enable the Meld crypto wizard functionality. If a value is not set, it defaults to false.

hideBackButton.description: Whether to hide the back button in the crypto widget. If a value is not set, it is assumed to be false.

maxQuotes.description: The maximum number of quotes to return

offrampEnabled.description: Should offramp behavior be enabled where supported. If a value is not set, it is assumed to be false.

offrampSwapEnabled.description: Should offramp+swap behavior be enabled where supported. If a value is not set, it is assumed to be false.

onrampEnabled.description: Should onramp behavior be enabled where supported. If a value is not set, it is assumed to be false.

onrampSwapEnabled.description: Should onramp+swap behavior be enabled where supported. If a value is not set, it is assumed to be false.

showAccountLogoOnTop.description: Should display account's logo in the top middle of widget border

standardPartnerFee.description: The standard preferred partner fee for this account.  This is informational rather than authoritative.

topServiceProviders.description: The top service provider's for the wizard quote screen

enableKycTokenImport.description: Whether the imported token will be used to import KYC applicant to Meld's KYC provider account (TRUE) or will be passed to network partners as is (FALSE)

status.description: Status of this typed preference belonging to the account

type.description: Type of preference to create for this account
